description: Kyogre lead with Avalanche and Origin Pulse, backed by Dialga and Xerneas as anti-dragon coverage. Origin Pulse handles Zacian/Zamazenta, Avalanche flips the Kyogre mirror via Waterfall pressure.

Avalanche turns Zygarde matchup in Kyogre's favor
Xerneas is the best anti-dragon, Dialga second best
Waterfall buff gives Kyogre better energy generation at the cost of some damage
Kyogre wins leads against non-Dragon types and Avalanche pressures Dragon safe swaps
Zacian with Behemoth Blade and Close Combat cleans up in the back
description: Newly buffed Waterfall Kyogre lead team built around Kyogre's improved energy generation, with Dialga as safe swap and Zacian as closer.
